column7: Notes on categories (click individual cells for specific justifications)
Fruits that don't provide any sort of physical defense against weapons
Special type for gum gum and berri berri fruits (immune to blunt damage)
Fruits that increase body armor but have increased vulnerability to pierce attacks
Completely invulnerable to weapons until haki comes into play
Fruits that allow attacks to get deflected
Might get normal stats but more likely to be able to escape/dodge
More likely to get hit but get a bigger damage reduction
Note: All fruit types with some sort of defense offer a net positive against weapon attacks.
